name: io.github.PaulRichez/devkit-for-strapi-mcp
description: Accurate Strapi project facts (UIDs, schemas, references) for AI agents — no more guessed UIDs.

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to your Strapi project (optional — defaults to the client's workspace roots or cwd)

environmentVariables.name: DEVKIT_LICENSE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Pro licence key (optional) — unlocks the plan_*/apply_* refactor tools; all read/analyse tools work without it
